nodes.label: AI as quick terminology lookup tool
nodes.grounding_span: It usually takes less than a second for the AI model to start generating the response

nodes.label: AI contextual understanding for colloquial terms
nodes.grounding_span: if it is a colloquial term, the AI assistant almost always returns better results than Google Search

nodes.label: AI as collaborative tool vs independent tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is more collaborating with it throughout my shift

nodes.label: AI reliability for common vs uncommon abbreviations
nodes.grounding_span: Certain abbreviations are less common and the AI assistant will have a hard time figuring it out

nodes.label: Human judgment in contextual interpreting
nodes.grounding_span: I have to rephrase and improvise to convey the real meaning

nodes.label: Work efficiency and speed
nodes.grounding_span: speed is really important when it comes to real-time interpretation

nodes.label: Accuracy in specialized terminology
nodes.grounding_span: the AI assistant would provide these options: The prescription is not strong enough

nodes.label: Professional autonomy and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I can do the job independently

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI speed and accuracy for terminology
nodes.grounding_span: It usually takes less than a second for the AI model to start generating the response

nodes.label: Frustration with AI on uncommon abbreviations
nodes.grounding_span: my AI assistant returns only international medical corps and Integrated Marketing Communications, both of which are irrelevant

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as non-essential tool
nodes.grounding_span: the AI assistant is more like a useful tool, rather than an essential part

nodes.label: Reserved view on expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: If it can do more than that, it's probably the time I should do something else

nodes.label: Systematic workflow design and optimization
nodes.grounding_span: I first wrote the instructions in my own words and asked a AI model to rewrite it for me so that it has a structured step-by-step work flow

nodes.label: Pragmatic fallback strategy — multiple backup options
nodes.grounding_span: I will fall back to Google search or I will just ask the client to clarify
